given: agents/graphify.md, commands/dev.md, commands/pull.md after fix applied
when: grepping for python3 invocations added by the graphify integration in the 4 identified locations
then: all 4 python3 invocations are prefixed with 'source "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/venv/bin/activate" &&'; style-inspector use-source-venv standard finds 0 critical violations for these files in the diff; no bare (non-venv-prefixed) python3 invocation of any graphify script exists in any target file

given: agents/graphify.md, agents/dev.md, agents/qa.md after fix applied
when: grepping for 'Step 7.5' or 'Step 1.5' (any form: heading or prose) in these three files
then: zero matches in all three files; equivalent prose uses 'between Step 7 and Step 8' or 'between Step 1 and Step 2' phrasing

given: agents/ba.md, agents/qa.md, scripts/graphify-query.py after fix applied
when: style-inspector english-only scan runs against these files
then: zero CJK literal violations reported; scripts/graphify-query.py:~47 uses Unicode escape strings (e.g. '\u4e4b\u524d'); agents/ba.md and agents/qa.md reference Chinese equivalents via pointer to docs/dev/ticket-20260527-132200.md; runtime behavior preserved (Python parses '\u4e4b\u524d' as the actual CJK char matching user input)

given: scripts/graphify-enrich.py after fix applied, a temporary context JSON file with valid JSON content, blast-radius-map.json absent for the test task-id
when: running graphify-enrich.py --task-id <test_id> --context-file <temp_context_json_path> where blast-radius-map.json does not exist
then: exit code is 0; temp_context_json_path has been updated with a graph_context field containing status=skipped; graph_context conforms to empty_graph_context(STATUS_SKIPPED) output shape with structural_context={} and ambiguity_hypotheses=[]

when: reading the graphify dispatch block (the section between the 'Graphify enrichment' anchor and the '### Step 8' heading)
then: the Graphify enrichment section (1) assigns a sentinel variable whose value contains 'graphify.json' and (2) wraps the Agent dispatch in an if-block that checks whether the sentinel file exists — the Agent is only dispatched when sentinel exists; when absent, dispatch is skipped and graphify is recorded as skipped/sentinel_absent; (3) the graph-summary.json read after dispatch is conditional on sentinel having existed

patterns.rationale: sentinel file path containing graphify.json must be named in prose within the Graphify enrichment block
prose must describe the absent-sentinel case: skip dispatch and record graphify_status=skipped/sentinel_absent

then: manifest.json has 12 entries in active_tests[]; tests/generated/20260527-132200/test_AC12_ac12-command-coverage.py exists; the test verifies semantic graphify integration presence in command files (graphify-query.py/graphify-enrich.py references in commands/dev.md) without asserting 'Step 1.5' or 'Step 7.5' literal strings

verify.condition: test file does NOT contain 'Step 1.5' or 'Step 7.5' as assertion target

when: reading the AC6 entry in each file using jq (for JSON) and section-scoped grep (for Markdown)
then: AC6 when field in acceptance-criteria-20260527-132200.json contains 'prose' (verified via jq); AC6 check.pattern in acceptance-criteria-20260527-132200.json no longer equals the old heading-only pattern '##+ Step [0-9]+\\.[0-9]' (verified via jq); the AC6 WHEN line in ticket-20260527-132200.md, extracted from the ### AC6 heading block, contains 'prose'

commands.rationale: AC6 when field must contain 'prose' after fix — this does NOT match the unfixed file which has no 'prose' in the when field
old heading-only pattern '##+ Step ...' must be gone from check.pattern after fix
AC6 WHEN line in ticket must contain 'prose' — scoped to AC6 block only to avoid false-pass from other sections
